decision.summary: Hold both current reach positions and do not add a new BTC trade this cycle.
decision.rationale: The April 11 73k Yes position is already effectively resolved in our favor at 99.95% with BTC spot at 73073.46 above the strike, so under the playbook exception it can be left to settle naturally rather than closed early. The weekly April 6-12 74k Yes remains open at 57.5%, well below take-profit. Beecthor’s latest transcript and summary have shifted the thesis back to medium-term bearish, expecting two more lows unless recent highs break, while Binance still shows BTC holding near 73k rather than confirming immediate downside. With the daily slot already filled, the remaining daily 74k upside market is only 23.0% and too discounted, and the available bearish markets are either too far/low-probability or not cleanly aligned with current execution reality.
